metaData.description: Regression test cases for Global Search functionality - Top Level

testData.memberIds: To be filled during test execution

testObjective.mainGoal: To verify Global Search functionality across all search types and match modes at Top Level
scope: Verify Global Search accessibility from PenScope home page
Test all search types: NI Number, Surname, First Name, Date of Birth, Postcode, Member Number
Validate Exact Match and Partial Match modes for each search type
Verify cross-scheme search functionality for Top Level users
Test search results display, sorting, and pagination
Validate security and access control for Top Level users
Test error handling and validation messages
Verify UI/UX and usability aspects of Global Search
testObjective.note: Refer to User Guide Chapter 1.9 for detailed Global Search functionality and business rules

accessRequirement.environmentAccess: Valid PenScope user credentials for XPS_ADMIN_DEV environment
accessRequirement.userRole: Top Level user with access to multiple schemes
accessRequirement.vpnAccess: VPN connection required for remote access
accessRequirement.databaseAccess: Read access to XPS_ADMIN_DEV database for validation queries

businessRules: Global Search is available only to Top Level users with appropriate permissions
Exact Match mode requires complete field values for accurate results
Partial Match mode uses wildcard search for flexible matching
Cross-scheme search requires access to multiple schemes
Search results are limited to schemes accessible by the logged-in user
Maximum 1000 search results can be displayed per query

testDataRequirement.niNumbers: At least 5 members with valid NI Numbers (e.g., AB123456C, CD789012E)
testDataRequirement.surnames: Members with common surnames for partial match testing (e.g., Smith, Jones, Williams)
testDataRequirement.firstNames: Members with common first names (e.g., John, Mary, David)
testDataRequirement.dateOfBirth: Members with various dates of birth for exact match testing
testDataRequirement.postcodes: Members with valid UK postcodes (e.g., SW1A 1AA, M1 1AE)
testDataRequirement.memberNumbers: Valid member numbers from different schemes

sampleTestData.description: Full NI Number for exact match, partial for wildcard search
Full surname for exact match, partial for wildcard search
Full first name for exact match, partial for wildcard search
Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format
Full postcode for exact match, partial for wildcard search
Full member number for exact match, partial for wildcard search

testScenariosCategory.description: Test basic search operations including access, search types, and match modes
Test advanced search features including multiple criteria and filters
Test search results display, sorting, and data accuracy
Test cross-scheme search functionality for Top Level users
Test search performance and pagination with large result sets
Test security restrictions and access control for different user roles
Test error messages and validation for invalid inputs
Test user interface, user experience, and usability aspects

testScenarioPriorityWise.highPrioritySummary: Critical search functionality including all search types and exact/partial match modes
testScenarioPriorityWise.mediumPrioritySummary: Advanced features including cross-scheme search and performance testing
testScenarioPriorityWise.lowPrioritySummary: Edge cases including case sensitivity and browser compatibility

sqlQueryScripts.description: Query to find a member by exact NI Number
Query to find members by surname with partial match using LIKE operator

sqlQueryScripts.queryTitle: Find Members by Date of Birth
sqlQueryScripts.description: Query to find all members with a specific date of birth
Query to find members by postcode with partial match
Query to count total members accessible by Top Level user

preExecutionSteps: Confirm Top Level user credentials are available (kundalik, Om)
Verify test data exists in database (run validation queries)
Review User Guide Chapter 1.9 for Global Search functionality
Ensure access to at least 3 different schemes for cross-scheme testing
mandatoryChecks: Take screenshots for each test case execution
Document actual results for each test case
Log any defects found during testing
Verify search results against database queries
Test both Exact Match and Partial Match modes for each search type
Test all 6 search types (NI Number, Surname, First Name, DOB, Postcode, Member Number)
Validate error messages for invalid inputs
postExecutionActivities: Test summary section completed with accurate metrics
All defects logged in defect tracking system

knownIssue.description: Search may timeout with large result sets (>1000 records)
knownIssue.workaround: Use more specific search criteria or enable Exact Match mode

knownIssue.description: Special characters in search fields may cause unexpected results
knownIssue.workaround: Avoid using special characters like %, _, * in search criteria

knownLimitation: Global Search is limited to Top Level users only
Maximum 1000 search results can be displayed per query
Search results are limited to schemes accessible by the logged-in user
Date of Birth search requires exact date format (DD/MM/YYYY)
Postcode search is case-insensitive but requires valid UK postcode format

signOffCriteria.criteriaDescription: All 40 test cases have been executed; All critical and high priority defects have been resolved or documented; Test summary section is complete with accurate metrics; All screenshots and evidence have been attached; Test report has been reviewed by QA Manager

environmentAccess: Valid PenScope user credentials for XPS_ADMIN_DEV
userRoles: Top Level user with access to multiple schemes
schemaAccess: Access to at least 3 different schemes for cross-scheme search testing
memberDataAccess: Test members with various attributes (different NI Numbers, surnames, postcodes, etc.)
